response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the required 5–10 years of strong C++ development on Windows, which is mandatory for this role. While they have C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is limited and not recent. Their domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also not demonstrated. Other strengths like SQL and communication are present, but insufficient to offset the critical skill gaps.
strengths: Strong communication and collaboration skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
Experience with SQL and database management (MongoDB, MySQL)
Diverse programming language proficiency (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Java, C, C++)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (only limited C++ work in 2014–2015)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Lacks mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience for this role
